eip_8037_design_decisions.highlight: Refund state gas to reservoir when reverts prevent state creation
Refund 0→X→0 storage transitions to reservoir, not refund counter
CREATE gas refunded when no state created; new VM behavior
Self-destruct refunds processed end-of-transaction, includes storage slots created
EIP-7702 authorization refunds go to reservoir when account exists
Transaction validity check now requires sufficient state gas coverage

testing_progress.highlight: State access benchmarks operational; initial results collected for EIP-7904/8038
bal-devnet-4 pre-interop → glamsterdam-devnet-0 at interop planned

organizational.highlight: Thread-based async spec discussions proved effective for edge cases
Next call during interop week; likely canceled

action_items.action: Benchmark self-destruct loop refund overhead with gas benchmarks post-8037
Async discussion: evaluate end-of-call vs in-place refund timing
Finalize EIP-7904/8038 benchmarks for interop presentation

decisions.decision: State gas refunded to reservoir when no state created (top-level reverts)
0→X→0 storage refunds go to reservoir; old refund counter deprecated for state gas
CREATE operations refund state gas when account creation fails
Self-destruct refunds all state gas at transaction end, including storage slots
EIP-7702 authorization refunds to reservoir when account pre-exists
Transaction inclusion requires sufficient state gas for maximum consumption
DevNet 4 uses in-place refunds; end-of-call alternative deferred pending review

targets.target: Interop week - Present final EIP-7904/8038 benchmarks; launch glamsterdam-devnet-0
